demo.name: Copper Axe
description: A decent alternative to a stone axe.
But it won't cut through hardwood.

demo.name: Copper Pickaxe
description: A decent alternative to a stone pickaxe.
But it'll struggle with tougher stone.

demo.name: Shovel
description: Perfect for digging up treasure, leveling ground, or piling up a mound.

EA0_10.name: Iron Axe
description: An iron axe - tough enough to bite into the Foothill's hardwood.

EA0_10.name: Iron Pickaxe
description: An iron pickaxe that makes mining ore much easier.

EA0_10.name: Simple Fishing Rod
description: With this in hand, every day's a good day for fishing!
